canonical_name: Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centres

local_names.hi: आयुष्मान भारत स्वास्थ्य एवं कल्याण केंद्र
local_names.bn: আয়ুষ্মান ভারত স্বাস্থ্য ও সুস্থতা কেন্দ্র
local_names.ta: ஆயுஷ்மான் பாரத் சுகாதார மற்றும் நலன்புரி மையம்
local_names.te: ఆయుష్మాన్ భారత్ ఆరోగ్య మరియు సంక్షేమ కేంద్రం
local_names.mr: आयुष्मान भारत आरोग्य व कल्याण केंद्र
local_names.gu: આયુષ્માન ભારત આરોગ્ય અને કલ્યાણ કેન્દ્ર
local_names.kn: ಆಯುಷ್ಮಾನ್ ಭಾರತ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಮತ್ತು ಕಲ್ಯಾಣ ಕೇಂದ್ರ
local_names.pa: ਆਯੁਸ਼ਮਾਨ ਭਾਰਤ ਸਿਹਤ ਅਤੇ ਤੰਦਰੁਸਤੀ ਕੇਂਦਰ
local_names.or: ଆୟୁଷ୍ମାନ ଭାରତ ସ୍ୱାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ ଏବଂ ସୁସ୍ଥତା କେନ୍ଦ୍ର

family_criteria.family_definition: Universal entitlement — all residents in the catchment area of a HWC are eligible regardless of income, caste, occupation, or insurance status. Area-based, not family-based.

covered_procedures: Care in pregnancy and childbirth (ANC, PNC, delivery facilitation)
Management of communicable diseases (TB, malaria, dengue, leprosy)
Management of common non-communicable diseases (hypertension, diabetes, cancer screening)
Screening for oral, breast, and cervical cancers
Care for common ophthalmic and ENT conditions
Mental health screening and basic management
Free essential medicines (expanded list of 172 medicines)
Free point-of-care diagnostics (blood sugar, BP, hemoglobin, urine, pregnancy test)
excluded_procedures: Hospitalization (referred to CHC/district hospital/PM-JAY empanelled hospital)
Advanced diagnostics (CT scan, MRI, PET scan)

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: For ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account) creation. Services cannot be denied for lack of ID.

required_documents.name: ABHA Card / Health ID
required_documents.notes: Preferred for digital health record linkage but not mandatory for receiving services

enrollment_channels: Walk-in to nearest Health and Wellness Centre (HWC)
Sub Health Centre upgraded to HWC
Primary Health Centre upgraded to HWC
enrollment_steps: Step 1: No enrollment needed — walk into any Health and Wellness Centre in your area
Step 2: Register with Community Health Officer (CHO) or ANM at the HWC
Step 3: Get ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account) created for digital health records (optional)
Step 4: Receive free primary care consultation, medicines, and point-of-care diagnostics
Step 5: For specialist consultation, use eSanjeevani teleconsultation at the HWC
Step 6: If hospitalization needed, get referral to CHC/district hospital/PM-JAY empanelled hospital
Step 7: Attend regular wellness activities, screening camps, and health promotion events at HWC
description_for_embedding: Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centres (AB-HWC) are the primary care pillar of the Ayushman Bharat programme, providing free comprehensive primary healthcare to all citizens at 1.78 lakh upgraded sub-health centres and PHCs across India. Services include free essential medicines (172 drugs), point-of-care diagnostics, NCD screening (hypertension, diabetes, cancer), maternal and child health, family planning, mental health, teleconsultation via eSanjeevani, and wellness activities. Universal access with no income criteria, no enrollment, and no documents required. Area-based coverage complementing PM-JAY hospitalization coverage.
